releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of Device Extensions Switcher.

Device Extensions Switcher lets you choose where each Obsidian community plugin should be active:

Both desktop and mobile
Desktop only
Mobile only
Disabled
It is designed for users who sync one shared .obsidian configuration folder between desktop and mobile devices, but want different active plugin sets on each device.

This release includes:

Device-based plugin assignment table
Desktop/mobile detection
Compact mobile UI
Sticky desktop table header
Safe default behavior for synced .obsidian setups
Built-in protection so the plugin cannot disable itself
No telemetry
No network requests

Required Obsidian community plugin assets are attached:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
